debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
integral_X : ∀ (i : ι), ∫ (ω : Ω), X i ω ∂μ = 0
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
X₁ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.fst
X₂ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.snd
X' : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X₁ i - X₂ i
this : DecidableEq ι
⊢ ∫ (ω : Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≤ ∫ (ω : Ω × Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ

failed_attempts: exact integral_le_integral_of_forall_le _ _

have h : ∀ i, ∫ x, X₁ i x ∂(μ.prod μ) = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X₁, integral_prod_left]
        rw [integral_X]
        simp
      have h' : ∀ i, ∫ x, X₂ i x ∂(μ.prod μ) = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X₂, integral_prod_right]
        rw [integral_X]
        simp
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
          = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω - 0‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by simp
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω - ∫ x, X i x ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
            simp_rw [integral_X]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, ∫ x, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω - X i x‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ∂μ := by
            exact integral_norm_sub_le_integral_integral_norm_sub μ (fun i ↦ X i) (by assumption)
        _ = ∫ p : Ω × Ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i p.1 - X i p.2‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂(μ.prod μ) := by
            simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, Prod.fst, Prod.snd]
            exact (integral_prod _ _).symm

have h_sym : ∀ i, IdentDistrib (X' i) (-X' i) (μ.prod μ) (μ.prod μ) := by
        intro i
        refine identDistrib_of_indepFun _ _ ?_
        · exact iIndepFun_X.prod_left
        · exact iIndepFun_X.prod_right
        · simp [X', integral_X i]
      have h_indep : iIndepFun X' (μ.prod μ) := by
        apply iIndepFun_X.prod_sub
      have h_memLp : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X' i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by
        intro i hi
        refine MemLp.add ?_ ?_
        · exact memLp_X i hi
        · exact memLp_X i hi
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
          = ∫ ω₁, ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ω₂ ∂μ ω₁ := by
            rw [integral_prod_right]
            exact fun _ ↦ integrable_pow_norm (memLp_X _ ‹_›)
        _ = ∫ ω₁, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ω₁ := by
            simp [integral_const]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω₁, ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁ - X i ω₂‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ω₂ ∂μ ω₁ := by
            refine le_integral_of_forall_le ?_ _
            · exact fun _ ↦ integrable_pow_norm (memLp_X _ ‹_›)
            · intro ω₁
              have : ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁ - X i ω₂‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ω₂ ≥
                ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
                rw [← sub_zero (∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁)]
                refine norm_sub_le_integral_norm ?_ ?_
                · exact fun _ ↦ integrable_pow_norm (memLp_X _ ‹_›)
                · simp [integral_X]
              exact this
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
            simp_rw [X']
            rw [integral_prod]
            exact fun _ ↦ integrable_pow_norm (h_memLp _ ‹_›)

apply probabilityTheory.marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetric
          · exact iIndepFun.fst_snd iIndepFun_X
          · intro i
            exact identDistrib_sub_self (X i)
          · intro i hi
            exact MemLp.fst_snd (memLp_X i hi)

apply ProbabilityTheory.lintegral_norm_sum_le_lintegral_norm_sum_sub
          · exact iIndepFun_X
          · exact iIndepFun_X
          · exact integral_X

have h : ∀ i, ∫ x, X₁ i x ∂(μ.prod μ) = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X₁, integral_prod_fst]
        rw [integral_X]
        exact zero_mem_class.integral_eq_zero
      have h' : ∀ i, ∫ x, X₂ i x ∂(μ.prod μ) = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X₂, integral_prod_snd]
        rw [integral_X]
        exact zero_mem_class.integral_eq_zero
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
          = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - ∫ x, X i x ∂μ)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
            simp_rw [sub_eq_add_neg, integral_X, add_zero]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X₁ i ω - X₂ i ω)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
            apply probabilityTheory.moment_ineq_symm
            · exact iIndepFun_X.prod_left_right
            · exact fun i => ⟨by simpa using memLp_X i (by assumption),
                by simpa using memLp_X i (by assumption)⟩

apply integral_mono_measure
            · exact MeasureTheory.Measure.prod_le_diag_of_finite μ
            · exact fun _ ↦ by positivity

apply le_of_eq
          congr
          ext1 ω
          simp [X', X₁, X₂, Prod.fst, Prod.snd]
          rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
exact marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetric h_indep h_symm h_memLp

apply marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetric
            · apply iIndepFun.prod_left_right
              exact iIndepFun_X
            · exact h₄
            · exact h₅

exact by
            apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_symm]
            simp [X', integral_X]

apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_left]
            simp [X', integral_X]

apply le_of_eq
            congr
            ext1 ω
            simp [X', X₁, X₂, Prod.fst, Prod.snd]
            rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]

apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_mul]
            simp [X', Finset.sum_sub_distrib, norm_sub_rev]

have h₁ : ∀ i, ∫ x : Ω × Ω, X' i x ∂μ.prod μ = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X', X₁, X₂, integral_sub, integral_comp_fst, integral_comp_snd, integral_X]
      have h₂ : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X' i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by
        intro i hi
        refine MemLp.sub ?_ ?_ <;> exact MemLp.comp_fst _ _ (memLp_X i hi)
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
          = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - ∫ x, X i x ∂μ)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
            simp [integral_X]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i (ω, ω)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
            simp [X', X₁, X₂]
        _ ≤ ∫ x : Ω × Ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i x‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
            exact integral_diag_le_integral_prod _ _

apply le_of_sub_nonneg
          have key : ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ -
              ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X₁ i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ ≥ 0 := by
            -- Use Jensen or convexity: since X₂ has mean zero and is independent,
            -- the function f(y) = ‖∑ X₁ - y‖^(2m) is minimized at y = E[X₂] = 0.
            -- But we can use the fact that for fixed x, ∫ ‖a - X₂(ω₂)‖^(2m) dμ(ω₂) ≥ ‖a‖^(2m)
            -- by Jensen since norm^p is convex for p ≥ 1.
            have conv : ConvexOn ℝ (Set.univ : Set E) fun v : E ↦ ‖v‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
              apply convexOn_norm_pow
              linarith
            have : ∀ x, ∫ y, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X₁ i (x, y) - X₂ i (x, y)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≥
                ‖∑ i ∈ A, X₁ i (x, y)‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
              intro x
              have : ∫ y, ‖(∑ i ∈ A, X₁ i (x, y)) - (∑ i ∈ A, X₂ i (x, y))‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≥
                  ‖(∑ i ∈ A, X₁ i (x, y)) - ∫ y, ∑ i ∈ A, X₂ i (x, y) ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
                apply convexOn.integral_le
                · exact conv
                · exact measurable_sum fun i _ ↦ (measurable_prod_mk _).comp (measurable_snd.comp (measurable_fst))
                · exact integrable_sum fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).norm.pow (2 * m) |>.integrable
              simp [h', Finset.sum_sub_distrib, sub_zero] at this
              simpa using this
            calc
              ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ
                = ∫ x, ∫ y, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i (x, y)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ∂μ := by
                  rw [integral_prod]
              _ ≥ ∫ x, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X₁ i (x, y)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
                  apply integral_mono
                  · exact measurable_sum fun i _ ↦ (measurable_prod_mk _).comp (measurable_fst)
                  · intro x; exact this x
              _ = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
                  simp [X₁, integral_prod_left]
          linarith

have h₁ : ∀ i, ∫ x, X₁ i x ∂(μ.prod μ) = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X₁, integral_prod_left]
        rw [integral_X]
        simp
      have h₂ : ∀ i, ∫ x, X₂ i x ∂(μ.prod μ) = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X₂, integral_prod_right]
        rw [integral_X]
        simp
      have h₃ : ∀ i, ∫ x, X' i x ∂(μ.prod μ) = 0 := by
        intro i
        simp [X']
        rw [integral_sub]
        · simp [h₁, h₂]
        · exact (memLp_X i (Finset.mem_univ i)).integral_ne_top
        · exact (memLp_X i (Finset.mem_univ i)).integral_ne_top
      have h₄ : ∀ i, IdentDistrib (X' i) (-X' i) (μ.prod μ) (μ.prod μ) := by
        intro i
        apply identDistrib_symm_of_indep
        · exact iIndepFun_X.indepFun.comp measurable_fst
        · exact iIndepFun_X.indepFun.comp measurable_snd
        · simp [X', neg_sub]
      have h₅ : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X' i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by
        intro i hi
        apply MemLp.sub
        · exact (memLp_X i hi).comp measurable_fst
        · exact (memLp_X i hi).comp measurable_snd
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
          = ∫ ω₁, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁ - ∫ ω₂, X i ω₂ ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
            simp_rw [integral_X]
            simp
        _ ≤ ∫ ω₁, ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁ - X i ω₂‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ∂μ := by
            exact integral_le_integral_of_forall_le fun ω₁ ↦
              by
                exact by
                  simp_rw [norm_sub_rev]
                  exact le_integral_norm (by exact (memLp_X _ (Finset.mem_univ _)).ae_measurable)
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
            simp [X']
            rw [integral_prod]
            · rfl
            · exact (MemLp.sum (fun i _ ↦ (memLp_X i (Finset.mem_univ i)).sub
                ((memLp_X i (Finset.mem_univ i)).comp measurable_snd))).snd

apply le_of_eq
          rw [integral_prod_sub]
          simp [X', integral_X]

apply le_of_eq
          rw [integral_prod_fst, integral_prod_snd, integral_X]
          simp [X', X₁, X₂]

apply ProbabilityTheory.lintegral_norm_sum_le_lintegral_norm_sum_symm
          · exact h₁
          · exact h
          · exact h₂

apply le_of_eq
          rw [integral_prod_left']
          intro ω₁
          rw [integral_prod_right']
          intro ω₂
          simp [X', X₁, X₂, Prod.fst, Prod.snd]

apply marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetric
          · exact h₄
          · exact h₅
          · exact h₆

apply le_of_eq
            congr
            ext1 ω
            simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, Prod.fst, Prod.snd]
            congr
            ext1 i
            simp

apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_mul_left]
            simp [X', h₁, h₂, h₃, h₄]

exact by
            apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_right]
            simp [X', X₁, X₂, integral_sub, integral_comp_fst, integral_comp_snd, integral_X]

apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_symm_sub _ _ _ _ h₄ h₆ h₅]

apply le_of_eq
          rw [integral_prod_mul_integral_of_nonneg]
          · simp [X', ← sub_eq_add_neg, sum_sub_distrib, norm_sum_le]
          · exact fun _ => by positivity

apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_mul_integral]
            · simp [X', X₁, X₂, integral_sub, integral_fst, integral_snd, integral_X]
            · exact fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).norm
            · exact fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).norm

apply le_of_eq
          congr
          ext1 ω
          simp [X', X₁, X₂, Prod.fst, Prod.snd]
          congr
          ext1 i
          simp

apply le_of_eq
          congr
          ext1 ω
          simp [X', X₁, X₂, Prod.fst, Prod.snd]
          congr
          ext1 i
          simp
apply marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetric h_indep h_symm h_memLp

apply le_of_eq
            rw [integral_prod_mul_integral_of_indepFun]
            · congr
              ext ω
              simp only [X₁, X₂, X', Pi.sub_apply, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
              ring
            · exact iIndepFun_X
            · exact iIndepFun_X
